verdict.rationale: The claimed EUR 33.48M matches the Q1 2026 (prior-period) annualized subscription value — it appears as the 'Prior' column in the Q2 2026 customer metrics sheet and in the Q1 2026 quarterly update — whereas the current authoritative Q2 2026 ASV is EUR 34.778M (34,778,000). An earlier period's value is asserted as if it were the current Q2 2026 figure.
verdict.suggested_action: Restate the Q2 2026 annualized subscription value as EUR 34.78 million, or clarify whether the claim intended to cite the prior-quarter (Q1 2026) figure of EUR 33.48 million.

final_text:
Based on the entity profile, the verbatim Q2 2026 customer metrics sheet, and the Q1 2026 quarterly update, I have full confirmation. The claim's EUR 33.48M is the Q1 2026 (prior-period) ASV — it appears explicitly as the "Prior" column in the Q2 2026 sheet and in the Q1 2026 update — while the current authoritative Q2 2026 ASV is EUR 34.778M.
